verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Break through, Break through all my doubts, Break through, Break through all my fears, Break through, That I may worship You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Break through, Break through all my pain, Break through all my guilt and my shame, Break through like only You can do.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are brighter than my darkest night, Stronger than my toughest fight, Just one touch from You my King my Friend, And I'll never be the same again.
